description: Series.mean(skipna=True) → skipna=False propagates NaN instead of ignoring it

_meta.explanation: skipna=False causes any NaN in the input to propagate: the result is NaN rather than the mean of the non-NaN values.
_meta.curriculum_note: Level 1. Classic NaN propagation vs NaN skipping distinction.
